summary: Rechecked the active DinoBrain hardening goal after v2.2.6. Verified the remaining goal blocker is still the fresh real Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit live proof. Started the live proof helper, which created a pending proof prompt file because clipboard access failed. Did not mark the goal complete because the fresh Codex Desktop proof has not yet been produced.
decisions: Do not accept stale live proof from before the v2.2.6 server build.
Do not count stdio MCP proof as the real Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit proof.
Use the live proof helper prompt in a fresh Codex Desktop thread to produce the remaining hard-gate evidence.
next_steps: Open or use a fresh Codex Desktop workspace thread and paste the prompt from reports/live-hooks/pending-DinoBrain-live-proof-20260708-012655-211822d5.txt.
After that prompt replies with OS context, rerun npm run verify:goal.
If verify:goal passes all requirements, then mark the active goal complete.
